content.situation: 朋友在社交媒体上很久没互动，见面时自然开启话题
content.speakerText: Hey! Haven't seen your posts in ages. What's new on your feed?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿！好久没看到你发帖了，你动态里有什么新鲜事吗？
content.responseTemplate: I've been ________ lately, to be honest.
content.hint: 当想表达最近没发帖时，常用这个短语表示休息或暂停
content.knowledgePoint: 口语中表达暂停社交媒体活动的常用表达

content.situation: 朋友注意到你换了社交平台，好奇地询问原因
content.speakerText: I noticed you're not on Instagram anymore — switched to something else?
content.speakerTextCn: 我注意到你不再用Instagram了——换别的平台了？
content.responseTemplate: Yeah, I'm all in on ________ now — it's just more fun.
content.hint: 年轻人常用这个平台替代Instagram，语气轻松，强调趣味性
content.knowledgePoint: 表达转向其他社交平台的自然说法

content.situation: 你看到朋友最近发了很多故事，想夸赞并开启对话
content.speakerText: Yo, your stories lately are fire! What's the secret?
content.speakerTextCn: 喂，你最近的故事太棒了！有什么秘诀吗？
content.responseTemplate: Thanks! I've just been ________ more lately.
content.hint: 表达分享真实生活而非刻意摆拍，是当前社交趋势的自然回应
content.knowledgePoint: 表达真实内容创作动机的口语方式
